# Dify

> AI Registry entry [AIR-22](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-22/dify) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-21. Departments: ai-office.

**Category:** Workflow Automation / AI Agent Creation
**Cost:** TBC (free sandbox; paid cloud, self-hosted at no licence cost)
**Departments:** AI Policy
**Assignee:** Jehad

## Overview

Open-source LLM application development platform. Combines visual workflow builder, RAG pipeline, agent framework, LLMOps tooling. Flexible deployment: managed cloud, self-hosted (Docker Compose), enterprise. Direct alternative to Lindy (AIO-21) with self-hosting for full data control under §5.2.3.

## Capabilities

* Visual canvas workflow builder
* 100s of LLMs from dozens of providers
* Built-in RAG pipeline
* Agent framework (function calling, ReAct) with 50+ tools
* Production monitoring, observability (Langfuse, Phoenix)
* Self-hosted Docker Compose with Terraform/CDK templates

## Why Evaluating

Same agent creation space as Lindy. Open-source, developer-oriented, self-hostable for full data control — particularly interesting under §5.2.3. Unified platform reduces tool sprawl.

*Evaluating.*
